title: coleus sahyadricus
intro: Coleus sahyadricus, also known as the Western Ghats Coleus, is a plant species native to the Western Ghats mountain range in India. It belongs to the Lamiaceae family and is traditionally used for its medicinal and therapeutic properties. The plant has been found to have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which can help in reducing inflammation and oxidative stress, thereby providing health benefits such as improved cardiovascular health and enhanced immune function. In Ayurvedic medicine, Coleus sahyadricus is often prepared in herbal teas or decoctions, and is also used in the form of powders or capsules to treat various ailments, including fever, cough, and digestive issues.
